name: qfoldit-skills
description: Twenty Claude skills for qFoldIT: scientific simulation (VQE, protein folding, bio-mining, corrosion, MEOR, prospecting, plant growth, plastic pyrolysis, L-systems, NanoVer VR bridge, BioNeMo structure prediction) plus digital-twin/engine adapters (Unreal, Unity, Unigine, OpenUSD/Omniverse, Apple RealityKit/visionOS, Three.js/WebXR) and universal scene export, built on a shared Universal Assembly Graph (UAG) format.
author: qFoldIT

scene-export.description: Converts an engine-agnostic scene description (molecules, L-system geometry) into universal files -- OBJ, glTF 2.0, standalone Three.js HTML, Godot 4.x GDScript -- for use outside the live MCP engine adapters

quantum.description: Classical statevector VQE simulator (numpy), validated against a published H2/STO-3G benchmark (arXiv:2209.09564)

qfold.description: Hybrid quantum-classical 2D HP-lattice protein folding (Dill 1985) with QAOA-style circuit on Braket LocalSimulator

bionemo-agent-toolkit.description: AlphaFold2, DiffDock, MolMIM, Evo 2, Boltz-2 -- real HTTP clients against self-hosted NVIDIA BioNeMo NIM containers, verified against NVIDIA's own docs. AlphaFold3 is handled via the separate alphafold3_mcp MCP server, not reimplemented here. Compatible client, not an official NVIDIA/DeepMind integration.

l-systems.description: L-systems for procedural plant branching/morphogenesis, renders SVG

meor.description: Kinetics of microbial enhanced oil recovery

mining.description: Bio-oxidation, biosorption, and cyanide degradation kinetics for metal recovery

oilgas.description: CO2 pipeline corrosion rate and remaining-wall-life estimation (de Waard-Milliams)

plant-growth.description: Plant growth/morphology modeling from NPK nutrition and light spectrum (qualitative, not species-calibrated)

plastic-characterization.description: Pyrolysis yield estimation for mixed plastic feedstock (oil/gas/char, chlorine risk)

prospecting.description: Indicator-taxa statistics for microbial biogeochemical mineral exploration

nanover.description: Bridge qFoldIT structures into NanoVer (IRL2) for collaborative interactive MD in VR -- third-party framework, citation required

game-designer.description: Produces the Universal Assembly Graph (UAG) -- the engine-neutral scene/interaction plan consumed by all engine adapters below

digital-twin-builder.description: Enriches a UAG with simulation semantics (units, physical properties, constraints) to make it digital-twin-ready before engine export

unreal-world-builder.description: Exports a UAG to Unreal Engine via the official Epic Games MCP plugin (EpicGames/unreal-engine-skills-for-claude-code-plugin)

unity-experience-builder.description: Exports a UAG to Unity via CoplayDev/unity-mcp -- community MIT bridge, NOT affiliated with Unity Technologies

unigine-simulation-engineer.description: Exports a UAG to UNIGINE 2, using docs-grounded verification against unigine-engine/ai-docs to avoid hallucinated API calls

openusd-architect.description: Exports a UAG to OpenUSD/NVIDIA Omniverse via the official NVIDIA-Omniverse/kit-usd-agents MCP servers

apple-spatial-designer.description: Exports a UAG to RealityKit/visionOS/USDZ via Xcode 26.3's official Claude Agent SDK / MCP integration

threejs-web-designer.description: Exports a UAG to a browser WebXR experience via Three.js/React Three Fiber -- community skills ecosystem, no single official one
